sections.title: Projects
sections.body: A growing collection of in-progress tools and systems focused on automation, syncing, and utility-driven workflows. These projects are being built to reduce manual steps, improve repeatability, and support practical day-to-day use.

items.title: Dir Sync
description: A utility for comparing directories and copying file changes from one location to another.
Focused on making file synchronization easier, safer, and more reliable without requiring constant manual work.
about: A file synchronization project focused on copying changed data between directories.
Built around practical syncing and backup-style workflows.

items.title: USB Auto Detect
description: A utility for detecting USB device connections and triggering related actions when drives are inserted or removed.
Designed to simplify workflows that depend on removable storage being recognized automatically.
about: A utility project centered on recognizing USB device connections automatically.
Designed to support automation that begins when removable media is detected.

items.title: USB Dir Sync
description: A utility that combines USB detection with directory synchronization so file copy tasks can begin when a target drive is connected.
Built to reduce manual backup steps and make portable sync workflows easier to run.
about: A combined utility that links USB detection with directory synchronization.
Intended to simplify portable backup and transfer workflows.
